title: Enhanced Traveler's Backpack GUI
description: This Texture Pack aims to enhance the GUI of the backpacks form the Mod Traveler's Backpack, which is made by Tiviacz1337!
body:
This Texture Pack aims to enhance the GUI of the backpacks form the Mod Traveler's Backpack, which is made by Tiviacz1337!

The color palette I used for the darkmode is form the Default Dark Mode Texturepack by nebulr!


You can use this Resource Pack in all game versions I marked it for but you'll get a warning, except in 1.19.x
